rationale: TypeScript is a large npm/TS monorepo with a package-lock.json; aspect_gazelle_js + aspect_rules_ts can generate ts_project/js_library targets from the src tree. We scope to src to avoid the build-script/gulp tooling and target the compiler/services source.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "typescript",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "aspect_rules_js", version = "3.2.2")
bazel_dep(name = "aspect_rules_ts", version = "3.8.11")
bazel_dep(name = "aspect_gazelle_js", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")

# Node toolchain (hermetic)
node = use_extension("@aspect_rules_js//npm:extensions.bzl", "node", dev_dependency = True)
node.toolchain(node_version = "20.11.1")

# TS toolchain pinned to the version this repo builds.
rules_ts_ext = use_extension("@aspect_rules_ts//ts:extensions.bzl", "ext", dev_dependency = True)
rules_ts_ext.deps(
    ts_version_from = "//:package.json",
)
use_repo(rules_ts_ext, "npm_typescript")

# npm deps from the existing lockfile. The repo ships package-lock.json (npm),
# not pnpm; aspect_rules_js can translate it via the npm_translate_lock path.
npm = use_extension("@aspect_rules_js//npm:extensions.bzl", "npm", dev_dependency = True)
npm.npm_translate_lock(
    name = "npm",
    npm_package_lock = "//:package-lock.json",
    verify_node_modules_ignored = "//:.bazelignore",
)
use_repo(npm, "npm")
root_build:
load("@aspect_gazelle_js//gazelle:defs.bzl", "gazelle")

# gazelle:js_pnpm_lockfile package-lock.json
# gazelle:exclude scripts
# gazelle:exclude tests
# gazelle:exclude bin
# gazelle:exclude node_modules
# gazelle:js_resolve **/*.json :json

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = "@aspect_gazelle_js//gazelle:gazelle_js_binary",
)
anticipated_risks: npm lock is package-lock.json not pnpm; npm_translate_lock conversion may need adjustment
internal _namespaces module-merging pattern and tsconfig project references not modeled by gazelle
code generation (processDiagnosticMessages, generated lib d.ts) is build-time and not captured
tsconfig path aliases / outFile bundling semantics differ from per-file ts_project
self-hosting build (TS compiles itself via Herebyfile) is not reproduced by ts_project
